title: nepeta formosa
intro: Nepeta formosa, also known as Formosa catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nepeta formosa include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Nepeta formosa can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and soothe the mind and body.
